meaning: n.鼓,圆绷,绷圈vt.在绷圈上绣vi.用绷圈绣
examples: The tambour is a hand drum instrument found in the Middle-East. It is often played solo to show the performer's dexterity in rhythm and speed.
This apart, in modern times the western Musical Instruments like the Tambourin and the Tambour are adaptations of the Indian Tambora and Tanpura.
Many have a sheltered garden at the back and an external porch called a tambour that keeps the cold and snow from entering the house (they are 800 miles north of Boston).
